title: Protocol for variant calling in SARS-Cov-2 enabling long indel detection
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1msvh","text":"Protocol for SARS-Cov-2 variant calling departing from raw reads in a run. First, we will de-novo assemble the genome using s-aligner, then we will use standard software for variant calling: BWA, samtools, and freebayes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dhria","text":"The advantage of this protocol is that it also finds long indels if they exist. Other protocols based on reference mapping will often miss these.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Assemble the genome Protocol for assembling SARS-Cov-2 runs with s-aligner by Juanjo Bermúdez

Call variants.sh to find variants. The script will call BWA, samtools, varscan and freebayes to generate a VCF file with the resulting variants. ./scripts/variants.sh RUN-ID ./results/RUN-ID-xxxx.fa PATH_TO_SARS_COV_2_REFERENCE_FASTA
creator: Juanjo Bermúdez
